title: The Noisy Keyboard
content: My keyboard makes a loud clicking sound every time I type. At first, I found the noise distracting, especially during online meetings. However, after using it for several weeks, I became accustomed to it. The keys are comfortable and respond quickly, which helps me type faster. Some of my coworkers even say they like the sound because it reminds them of old typewriters. Although the keyboard is noisy, it has become one of my favorite tools for work and study.
